name: Sweet Pimiento Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pimientos, bouillon cubes, and water in a food processor container.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a small saucepan.
4. Stir over medium heat for 2-3 minutes.
5. Stir in the parsley just before serving.
Makes 8 servings of 1 tablespoon each. Use to brighten vegetables, fritattas, meatloaves, or nutty-bean loaves; to color potato or white-sauce based soups; to dip a bite of breaded cutlet; use instead of butter on a baked potato. Variations include using V8 instead of bouillon, cilantro instead of parsley, and adding a little vinegar and capers before serving. Add Tabasco (red or green) before serving.
